methods.name: from_build_ele

methods.remarks: Initialize the PythonPart group from a BuildingElement

params.name: build_ele
params.doc: Building element containing parameter values of the PythonPart group

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of the group. If not provided, the name of the .pyp file will be used

params.name: pythonparts
params.doc: List of PythonParts to put into group. You can initialize an empty group and append PythonParts to it using append() or extend()

params.name: type_uuid
params.doc: define the selectable type defines the selectable type

params.name: type_display_name
params.doc: display name for the tooltip and object palette

properties.name: pythonparts
properties.summary: List of the PythonParts in the group
